name: pathml
tagline: Guide for PathML, a Python toolkit for whole-slide pathology image loading, preprocessing, ML training, and spatial proteomics analysis.
verdict: Clean documentation-only skill: no shell execution, no secrets access, no network calls beyond a standard pip install. Description matches content, install source is PyPI. References six detail files not fetched here, so their content is unverified, but the SKILL.md itself is safe and well-scoped.

highlights.summary: No explicit statement of what a completed task should produce (files, artifacts, format); output is only implied by the code sample (processed tiles/masks), acceptable for a reference-style skill but

SKILL.md itself contains no troubleshooting/error-handling guidance; it claims 'troubleshooting guidance' lives in the six reference files (line 149), which are not part of this review since no bundle
